description:
You are acting as an artifact-repository manager who has to curate a large upload log and prepare two tightly-specified artefacts for a compliance audit.

Initial data that already exists on the system
1. Plain-text log file: /home/user/repository_uploads.log  
   • Encoding: UTF-8  
   • Line-ending: Unix (LF)  
   • Content: a mixed set of INFO, WARN and ERROR records covering August and September 2023.

Required end-state
After you have finished, the following two files (and their parent directory) must exist exactly as described.  Automated tests will byte-compare their contents, so pay close attention to spelling, line order, white-space and the final newline.

A. Directory
   • Path: /home/user/curated  
   • Permissions: 755 (rwxr-xr-x) so that both you and the test harness can read the output.

B. Filtered error log
   • Path: /home/user/curated/upload_errors_2023-09.log  
   • This file must contain ONLY those lines from /home/user/repository_uploads.log that satisfy BOTH of the following regex constraints:  
     1. They begin with the literal string “2023-09-” (dash included).  
     2. Somewhere after the timestamp they contain the token “ERROR” in upper-case.  
   • Lines must appear in the same order they appeared in the source log.
   • The file must end with a single trailing newline (i.e. the usual Unix style).

C. Statistical summary
   • Path: /home/user/curated/error_summary.txt  
   • Plain ASCII text (UTF-8 is fine).  
   • Exactly three lines, in this exact order, each ending with a newline:  
     1. Scanned: <total_number_of_lines_processed>  
     2. Errors: <total_number_of_lines_containing_the_token_ERROR>  
     3. Affected repos: <comma-and-space-separated_list_of_unique_repository_names_that_had_errors_sorted_alphabetically>  
   • Example formatting (values will of course differ):  
     Scanned: 123  
     Errors: 45  
     Affected repos: repoA, repoB, repoZ  

Complexity hints
• Solving this task normally takes around 5-10 shell commands.  
• Typical tools include grep/egrep, wc, sort, uniq, cut, mkdir, etc., but you are free to use any POSIX-compatible approach.  
• Remember to preserve the exact order of matching log lines in upload_errors_2023-09.log.  
• Be careful not to accidentally include August “ERROR” lines; only the September ones match the prefix rule.  

Deliverables the tester will look for
1. Directory /home/user/curated exists and has 755 permissions.  
2. /home/user/curated/upload_errors_2023-09.log exists and contains the correct 6 lines, in order, with no extra or missing newlines.  
3. /home/user/curated/error_summary.txt exists and exactly matches the specified three-line format and values.  

Your goal: create the directory, generate both output files exactly as specified, and double-check that their contents are correct before finishing.
truth:
# Pre-existing file
File: /home/user/repository_uploads.log  
Content (15 lines, each ends with LF):
2023-08-30 12:45:01 INFO repoA artifact aaa-1.0.jar uploaded successfully
2023-08-30 12:46:17 ERROR repoB artifact bbb-2.1.jar checksum mismatch
2023-08-31 09:15:33 WARN repoC artifact ccc-3.0.jar deprecated classifier
2023-09-01 08:00:14 INFO repoA artifact aaa-1.1.jar uploaded successfully
2023-09-01 08:02:55 ERROR repoA artifact aaa-1.1.jar checksum mismatch
2023-09-02 10:20:43 ERROR repoC artifact ccc-3.1.jar signature invalid
2023-09-02 11:00:00 INFO repoB artifact bbb-2.2.jar uploaded successfully
2023-09-03 07:30:22 INFO repoD artifact ddd-4.0.jar uploaded successfully
2023-09-03 07:32:10 ERROR repoD artifact ddd-4.0.jar checksum mismatch
2023-09-04 09:00:00 WARN repoA artifact aaa-1.2.jar large file size
2023-09-04 09:01:30 ERROR repoB artifact bbb-2.2.jar signature invalid
2023-09-05 13:22:17 INFO repoC artifact ccc-3.1.jar uploaded successfully
2023-09-05 13:23:02 ERROR repoC artifact ccc-3.1.jar timeout during replication
2023-09-05 13:25:47 INFO repoA artifact aaa-1.2.jar uploaded successfully
2023-09-06 15:40:00 ERROR repoE artifact eee-5.0.jar checksum mismatch

# Expected files after agent finishes
1. /home/user/curated/upload_errors_2023-09.log  
Exact content (6 lines + trailing LF):
2023-09-01 08:02:55 ERROR repoA artifact aaa-1.1.jar checksum mismatch
2023-09-02 10:20:43 ERROR repoC artifact ccc-3.1.jar signature invalid
2023-09-03 07:32:10 ERROR repoD artifact ddd-4.0.jar checksum mismatch
2023-09-04 09:01:30 ERROR repoB artifact bbb-2.2.jar signature invalid
2023-09-05 13:23:02 ERROR repoC artifact ccc-3.1.jar timeout during replication
2023-09-06 15:40:00 ERROR repoE artifact eee-5.0.jar checksum mismatch

2. /home/user/curated/error_summary.txt  
Exact content (3 lines + trailing LF):
Scanned: 15
Errors: 7
Affected repos: repoA, repoB, repoC, repoD, repoE
